title: STAT+: An AI startup floats FDA deregulation, using an obscure backdoor
description: In this edition of STAT's Health Tech: An AI startup pushes for some AI-powered medical devices to be exempt from pre-market review, and other health tech news.
content: In this edition of STAT's Health Tech: An AI startup pushes for some AI-powered medical devices to be exempt from pre-market review, and other health tech news.
